text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As a Mejiro Umamusume, I must display<n>only the
strongest sense of self-control...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That's right. This is just another test for<n>me to
overcome.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No matter what, I shall not give in... Not<n>even for
the cafeteria's deluxe Mont<n>Blanc dessert!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I will resist this temptation... W-wait, ithas two types of chestnuts? Hnnngh!
